## NetworkRequestEvent type

Fired before a network request is sent. Listeners can mutate the request URL, headers, and method.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type NetworkRequestEvent = {
    type: NetworkRequestType;
    request: NetworkRequest;
};
```
**References:** [NetworkRequestType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkrequesttype)<!-- -->, [NetworkRequest](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkrequest)
